name: Cochrane CD015790_pub2 analysis 2: Overall health-related quality of life – final value
citation: Cochrane review CD015790_pub2 (DOI 10.1002/14651858.CD015790.pub2). Binary 2x2 data extracted via Pairwise70/cochrane-data-extractor; reference = metafor rma (REML) from pairwise70 ma4_metafor_validation.csv.
note: Engine REML reproduces the metafor pooled estimate to <5e-6 on this real Cochrane dataset. Re-verify against the source review forest plot before external citation.
